languages.text: "Мы с Нунциусом продолжим совершенствовать процедуру триасомии. Для этого мне понадобится немало технологий... не имперского происхождения. Я займусь их поиском, продолжая экспериментировать на себе, и достигну идеала! Даже, если Империум не поймет меня, я брошу вызов смерти — это мой долг".

"Nuncius and I will continue to refine the triasomia procedure. In order to do so, I will require a great deal of technologies that are... not Imperial in origin. I will seek them out, continuing to experiment on myself, and I will achieve perfection! Even if the Imperium misunderstands me, I will defy death — it is my duty."
languages.original_text: "Мы с Нунциусом продолжим совершенствовать процедуру триасомии. Для этого мне понадобится немало технологий... не имперского происхождения. Я займусь их поиском, продолжая экспериментировать на себе, и достигну идеала! Даже, если Империум не поймет меня, я брошу вызов смерти — это мой долг".

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius and I will continue to refine the triasomia procedure. In order to do so, I will require a great deal of technologies that are... not Imperial in origin. I will seek them out, continuing to experiment on myself, and I will achieve perfection! Even if the Imperium misunderstands me, I will defy death — it is my duty."

"Nuncius and I will continue to refine the triasomia procedure. In order to do so, I will require a great deal of technologies that are... not Imperial in origin. I will seek them out, continuing to experiment on myself, and I will achieve perfection! Even if the Imperium misunderstands me, I will defy death — it is my duty."

"Nuncius and I will continue to refine the triasomia procedure. In order to do so, I will require a great deal of technologies that are... not Imperial in origin. I will seek them out, continuing to experiment on myself, and I will achieve perfection! Even if the Imperium misunderstands me, I will defy death — it is my duty."

languages.text: «Nuncius y yo seguiremos refinando el procedimiento de triasomía. Para ello, necesitaré numerosas tecnologías... de origen no imperial. ¡Las buscaré y seguiré experimentando conmigo mismo hasta alcanzar la perfección! Aunque el Imperium me malinterprete, desafiaré a la muerte... es mi deber».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I will continue to refine the triasomia procedure. In order to do so, I will require a great deal of technologies that are... not Imperial in origin. I will seek them out, continuing to experiment on myself, and I will achieve perfection! Even if the Imperium misunderstands me, I will defy death — it is my duty."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius y yo seguiremos refinando el procedimiento de triasomía. Para ello, necesitaré numerosas tecnologías... de origen no imperial. ¡Las buscaré y seguiré experimentando conmigo mismo hasta alcanzar la perfección! Aunque el Imperium me malinterprete, desafiaré a la muerte... es mi deber».

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスと私は、トリアソミアの手技を洗練させ続けます。そのためには、その起源が……帝国のものではない技術が、大量に必要となります。私はそれらを探し求め、自らの身で実験を続け、そして完成に到達してみせます！ たとえ帝国が私を理解せずとも、私は死に抗う――それが私の務めなのです」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I will continue to refine the triasomia procedure. In order to do so, I will require a great deal of technologies that are... not Imperial in origin. I will seek them out, continuing to experiment on myself, and I will achieve perfection! Even if the Imperium misunderstands me, I will defy death — it is my duty."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスと私は、トリアソミアの手技を洗練させ続けます。そのためには、その起源が……帝国のものではない技術が、大量に必要となります。私はそれらを探し求め、自らの身で実験を続け、そして完成に到達してみせます！ たとえ帝国が私を理解せずとも、私は死に抗う――それが私の務めなのです」

languages.text: “我和努恩修斯将继续完善三相融合程序。为此，我将需要大量……并非出自帝国的技术。我会去追寻它们，继续在自己身上做实验，而我终将抵达完美！即便帝国无法理解，我也要对抗死亡——这是我的职责。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I will continue to refine the triasomia procedure. In order to do so, I will require a great deal of technologies that are... not Imperial in origin. I will seek them out, continuing to experiment on myself, and I will achieve perfection! Even if the Imperium misunderstands me, I will defy death — it is my duty."

traits.locale_text: “我和努恩修斯将继续完善三相融合程序。为此，我将需要大量……并非出自帝国的技术。我会去追寻它们，继续在自己身上做实验，而我终将抵达完美！即便帝国无法理解，我也要对抗死亡——这是我的职责。”

languages.text: "Nuncius und ich werden die Triasomiaprozedur weiter optimieren. Dazu werde ich viele Technologien brauchen, die ... nicht imperialen Ursprungs sind. Ich werde sie suchen, um weiter an mir zu experimentieren und Perfektion zu erlangen! Selbst wenn mich das Imperium missversteht, werde ich dem Tod trotzen ... das ist meine Pflicht."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I will continue to refine the triasomia procedure. In order to do so, I will require a great deal of technologies that are... not Imperial in origin. I will seek them out, continuing to experiment on myself, and I will achieve perfection! Even if the Imperium misunderstands me, I will defy death — it is my duty."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius und ich werden die Triasomiaprozedur weiter optimieren. Dazu werde ich viele Technologien brauchen, die ... nicht imperialen Ursprungs sind. Ich werde sie suchen, um weiter an mir zu experimentieren und Perfektion zu erlangen! Selbst wenn mich das Imperium missversteht, werde ich dem Tod trotzen ... das ist meine Pflicht."

languages.text: « Nuncius et moi allons continuer de développer la procédure de triasomia. Pour cela, j'aurai besoin de nombreuses technologies dont l'origine... est extérieure à l'Imperium. Je les chercherai tout en poursuivant mes expériences sur moi-même, jusqu'à atteindre la perfection ! Même si l'Imperium ne me comprend pas, je surmonterai la mort. Tel est mon devoir. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I will continue to refine the triasomia procedure. In order to do so, I will require a great deal of technologies that are... not Imperial in origin. I will seek them out, continuing to experiment on myself, and I will achieve perfection! Even if the Imperium misunderstands me, I will defy death — it is my duty."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius et moi allons continuer de développer la procédure de triasomia. Pour cela, j'aurai besoin de nombreuses technologies dont l'origine... est extérieure à l'Imperium. Je les chercherai tout en poursuivant mes expériences sur moi-même, jusqu'à atteindre la perfection ! Même si l'Imperium ne me comprend pas, je surmonterai la mort. Tel est mon devoir. »

languages.text: "Nuncius ve ben üçyeközleştirme prosedürünü geliştirmeye devam edeceğiz. Bunu yapmak için kökeni... İmparatorluk'a ait olmayan pek çok teknolojiye ihtiyacım olacak. Onları arayacağım, kendi üzerimde deneyler yapmaya devam edeceğim ve mükemmelliğe ulaşacağım! İmparatorluk beni yanlış anlasa bile ölüme meydan okuyacağım. Bu benim vazifem."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I will continue to refine the triasomia procedure. In order to do so, I will require a great deal of technologies that are... not Imperial in origin. I will seek them out, continuing to experiment on myself, and I will achieve perfection! Even if the Imperium misunderstands me, I will defy death — it is my duty."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius ve ben üçyeközleştirme prosedürünü geliştirmeye devam edeceğiz. Bunu yapmak için kökeni... İmparatorluk'a ait olmayan pek çok teknolojiye ihtiyacım olacak. Onları arayacağım, kendi üzerimde deneyler yapmaya devam edeceğim ve mükemmelliğe ulaşacağım! İmparatorluk beni yanlış anlasa bile ölüme meydan okuyacağım. Bu benim vazifem."
